Extension Open System Codes UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-000 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add C-000-EX 0 8A Global Extension Remain in System Codes UI “Code ID” section Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-EX 0 8A Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add Pck Cubed Dir Bytes 50 5 -50 5 Pck Cubed Dir 50 5 -50 5 Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Pck Cubed Dir” Click on “Parameters” Tab Select Program Template and then select “Add” Input the below information and hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” again Go to Byte 50 5 -50 5 and check the Y/N flag Click Save Adding Application Identifiers Navigate to the Application Identifiers UI Click Add Add the AI’s shown below, then click save Once adding the AI fields shown above, click on the field again, then navigate to the bottom of the screen and click on the tab “AI Transaction Configuration” Configure as shown below Click save Add the next AI field and transaction as shown below, similar to the previous steps Add the AI Transaction Config then click save Add the Application Identifier “Batch or lot number” then click save Add the AI Transaction Config then click save Add the Application Identifier “Production Date (YYMMDD)” then click save Add the AI Transaction Config then click save Add the Application Identifier “Minimum Durability Date (YYMMDD)” then click save Add the AI Transaction Config then click save Adding Barcode Types Navigate to the Barcode Types UI Click Add Configure the item barcode with AI field as shown below Click Save Click Add Configure the lot number barcode with AI as shown below Click Save
